title: アオハル杯4戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's time for the fourth preseason match of
the Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Do your best! Y-you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm always causing grief and troubling the others
because of my misfortune...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to do something to help them instead,
so I'm practicing cheering for them...
choice_data_list: Your cheering will make all the difference.
